nodes.label: Voice Frequency
nodes.description: MIDI note frequency from HiseEvent (set once at voice start)

nodes.label: SemitoneTranspose
nodes.description: Shifts base frequency in semitones (-24 to +24)

nodes.label: Harmonic Frequency Calculation
nodes.description: Computes integer harmonic frequencies (f, 2f, 3f, ...) from transposed note frequency. Clamps bands above 0.4 * sampleRate.

nodes.label: NumFilterBands
nodes.description: Number of active harmonic bands: 1, 2, 4, 8, or 16 (power-of-two mapping)

nodes.label: CrossfadeValue
nodes.description: Blend position between slider pack A and B (0.0-1.0)

nodes.label: Slider Pack A
nodes.description: Per-band gain values in dB (-24 to +24)

nodes.label: Slider Pack B
nodes.description: Alternate per-band gain values in dB (-24 to +24)

nodes.label: A/B Gain Interpolation
nodes.description: Linear interpolation of per-band dB gains from packs A and B using crossfade value

nodes.label: QFactor
nodes.description: Filter Q (4-48), uniform across all bands. Higher = narrower peaks.

nodes.label: Series Peak Filter Bank
nodes.description: N SVF peak EQ filters in series, each tuned to successive harmonics. Per-sample processing.

nodes.label: Voice Audio Out (L/R)
nodes.description: Filtered per-voice stereo output (no dry/wet mix)
